app.name: ICHIA Enterprise

login.desc: Unified Platform · AI Assistant · Business Management

form.label: Display name
form.baseUrlInvalid: Base URL must start with http(s)://

language.label: Language
language.currentDesc: The language currently used by the app
language.switchFailed: Language switch failed, reverted to previous setting

update.currentVersionDesc: The application version you are currently using

update.checkBtnDesc: Connect to the server immediately to check for new versions
update.isLatest: You are on the latest version

update.notifyAvailableMsg: Downloading in the background. You will be notified to restart when ready.
update.notifyDownloadedMsg: The app will restart in {seconds} seconds to complete the installation. Please save your work.

log.folderDesc: Contains application logs. When reporting issues, please attach today's .log file.
log.pathDesc: Absolute path to the log folder
log.retentionDesc: Logs older than 14 days are auto-purged
log.viewerDesc: Enter password to browse, filter and search all local logs
log.viewerPrompt: Enter password to open log viewer

platform.searchPlaceholder: Search by system name or description…
platform.emptyAll: No systems configured. Edit unifiedPlatform.systems in app-config.json.

internal.comingSoonDesc: More internal tools are on their way
internal.emptyAll: No tools configured. Add them in internalFunctions.tools of app-config.json.

iframe.errorDesc: This may be due to network, SSL certificate, or the target site disallowing embedding. Try opening in browser.

repair.itReplyEmpty: IT has not posted a reply yet

repair.uploadOnlyImage: Only image files are allowed (jpg / png / gif, etc.)

aiSop.tip: Supports PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, and text files up to 20MB
